claimText: • Union Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) has informed that the number of most affected LWE districts reduced from 6 to three (Bijapur, Sukma, Narayanpur- all in Chhattisgarh).

claimText: • Operation Green Hunt: Began in late 2009. It takes place across five states - West Bengal, Jharkhand, Bihar, Orissa and Chhattisgarh.
